cityThesis: One narrow exact-site hosted review motion for industrial robotics teams evaluating San Jose warehouse and manufacturing interiors.

metricsDependencies.notes: Ensure intake parsing matches San Jose industrial robotics demand.
Track routing between exact_site, adjacent_site, and scoped_follow_up.
Establish baseline time-to-proof for San Jose warehouse and manufacturing interiors.
Triggered after rights clearance and proof-pack assembly.
Verify that buyers open the hosted review surface.
Track artifact-led follow-up after the technical review.
Marks successful technical proof and transition to human commercial handling.
Expose rights, format, or stack blockers before live outreach widens.

namedClaims.subject: Roboteon
namedClaims.claim: San Jose HQ warehouse robotics platform focused on platform, integration, interoperability, orchestration, simulation, and AI/ML for warehouses and 3PLs.

namedClaims.subject: Applied Intuition
namedClaims.claim: Their San Jose research work is explicitly oriented around physical AI, world-action foundation model pre-training, robot learning, and grounded multimodal data.

namedClaims.subject: Vimaan
namedClaims.claim: Warehouse inventory tracking and customer-specific product demonstrations make Vimaan a plausible San Jose exact-site or adjacent-site buyer cluster.

namedClaims.subject: Air-Gapped Delivery
namedClaims.claim: Some San Jose buyers may require air-gapped or non-web artifact delivery for controlled environments.

rightsPath.summary: Use buyer_requested_site or site_operator_intro for private industrial interiors, and require explicit operator authorization before capture dispatch.

issueSeeds.title: Lock the first San Jose lawful access path
issueSeeds.summary: Secure the first rights-cleared San Jose industrial access path for an exact-site hosted review, starting from buyer_requested_site or site_operator_intro and falling back to other lawful modes only when authorized.
successCriteria: The first lawful access path is explicitly authorized and tied to a named site and workflow lane.
The first proof candidate is routed through a valid lawful-access mode before any capture dispatch.

requiredApprovals.reason: New city activation and any rights/privacy exception that changes public posture require founder gate.
Private industrial access requires authority verification, first-capture thresholds, and proof-pack controls.
Requires manual verification of site authorization and rights/privacy boundaries before materialization.

validationBlockers.summary: Verify exact-site artifact compatibility with Applied Intuition, Scale AI, and similar robotics toolchains before live outreach.
Verify the first San Jose proof assets are rights-cleared and tied to a lawful access mode before buyer-visible claims or hosted-review invites.
Verify whether export-controlled or dual-use industrial buyers require air-gapped delivery over the web app.
